ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "cancer_type" TEXT /* Type of cancer being studied */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution conducting the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "ethical_approval_number" TEXT /* Ethical approval number for the study */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date the study data was last updated */,
  "raw_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the raw data (e.g., TCGA, GEO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the sample belongs to */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Treatment status of the patient */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., tissue, blood) */,
  "sample_count" INTEGER /* Number of samples for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cna_data" (
  "cna_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CNA data entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the CNA data belongs to */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for CNA data generation */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the CNA analysis was performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the analysis */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the CNA data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cna_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cna_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mrna_data" (
  "mrna_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mRNA data entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the mRNA data belongs to */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for mRNA data generation */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the mRNA analysis was performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the analysis */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the mRNA data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mrna_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mrna_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methylation_data" (
  "methylation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methylation data entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the methylation data belongs to */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for methylation data generation */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the methylation analysis was performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the analysis */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the methylation data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("methylation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methylation_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_data" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation data entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the mutation data belongs to */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for mutation data generation */,
  "num_antibodies" INTEGER /* Number of antibodies used in the RPPA platform */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the mutation analysis was performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the analysis */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the mutation data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteomic_data" (
  "proteomic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proteomic data entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the proteomic data belongs to */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for proteomic data generation */,
  "num_genes" INTEGER /* Number of genes in the proteomic data */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the proteomic data */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the proteomic analysis was performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the analysis */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the proteomic data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proteomic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteomic_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raw_data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each raw data file */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the raw data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the raw data file in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the raw data file (e.g., CSV, FASTQ) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raw_data_files_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Browser or application used to access the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data file */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the changes */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Detailed log of changes made in the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versioning_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versioning_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES raw_data_files ("file_id")
)
